title: ruscus hypoglossum var. microglossus
intro: Ruscus hypoglossum var. microglossus, also known as the dwarf ruscus or dwarf polypody, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Ruscus hypoglossum plant, which is a type of evergreen fern native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ruscus hypoglossum var. microglossus include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve circulation, and act as an antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a treatment for various health conditions.
